title: Leaderboards
seoTitle: Game of Darts Leaderboards | BarkinMad Studios
description: Review Game Center leaderboard support for X01, Cricket, Snooker, Bob's 27, 1 to 20, and Halve It in Game of Darts.
summary: Leaderboards require Game Center sign-in and are displayed through the app's Leaderboards screen.
heroImageAlt: Placeholder artwork for pending Game of Darts leaderboards image
sourceNotes: Based on Statistics-Engine.md, LeaderboardRules.swift, HelpView, and GameCenterManager source.
Some lower-is-better and hidden/unavailable leaderboard behavior remains To Verify in the central issue register.

sections.heading: Supported surfaces
paragraphs: The Leaderboards screen displays Match Darts highest score plus selectable X01 variants, Cricket highest score, Snooker variants, Bob's 27 best score, 1 to 20 least darts, and Halve It highest score.
Game Center sign-in is required for leaderboards.

sections.heading: Submission rules
paragraphs: Current source has explicit leaderboard rules for X01 highest score, best checkout, best average, most 180s, and 1 to 20 least darts.
The app has an auto-post setting for leaderboards. Central docs flag some Game Center resource visibility and lower-is-better behavior as To Verify.

images.alt: Placeholder artwork for Game of Darts leaderboards
images.caption: Leaderboard screenshot pending
